falsification_conditions.condition: The price of the asset rises by 15% or more from its current level within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A sharp upward move would contradict the 'HOLD' signal and suggest the pattern is not a bearish blowoff but a bullish continuation, invalidating the current verdict.

falsification_conditions.condition: Trading volume exceeds 200% of the 20-day average volume within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Sustained extreme volume would indicate strong market participation, refuting the 'UNKNOWN' verdict by showing clear momentum contrary to the expected pattern.

falsification_conditions.condition: A central bank announces a major stimulus program (e.g., quantitative easing) within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Such an event would inject liquidity and alter market dynamics, directly contradicting the assumption of a self-contained pattern and invalidating the current call.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
